title: MBS core.attachment block
description: First-class content-addressed attachment with out-of-band storage per §7.4.

sources.description: Ordered list of sources. Client tries in order. Marque URIs preferred; IPFS-style DHT URIs permitted.

encrypted_to_group.description: Whether the blob is encrypted to the MLS group key. Default true.

delta_base_cid.description: Optional. Base CID for BLAKE3 Merkle delta sync.
